error_signature: no new rows added due to matching update condition
title: No new rows added in Google Sheets due to existing data
symptom: When attempting to append or update rows in Google Sheets, no new rows are added because existing data matches the update condition.
applies_when: Data matches existing entries in the sheet
not_this_if: Data is completely new and does not match any existing entries
root_cause: The Google Sheets node in n8n checks for existing data that matches the update condition before appending new rows. If a match is found, it will not add new rows, leading to the appearance that the operation has failed.
fix_steps: Check the existing data in the Google Sheet to identify any matches with the new data.
Delete or modify the existing rows that match the update condition.
Retry the workflow to append new data.
agent_instruction: Ensure there are no matching entries in the Google Sheet before appending new data.
safety_notes: Deleting rows may result in data loss if not backed up.
